rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for constants and equations
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions; use visible ports or constants instead
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in guarantees using visible feature names
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` and `const name : type = value;` syntax
Use `assign output = expression;` syntax for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without visible ports or constants
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
